Construction — Material catalog

No material catalog loaded

Import CSVs from your Database files folder, then refresh this page.

cd backend
.venv\Scripts\python scripts\load_material_pricing.py --all-defaults

Set DATABASE_FILES_ROOT in backend\.env if files are not under OneDrive.
